title: Misclassification Triage v2: actionable mechanical detail and next-action guidance

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implementing approved v2 plan: strict mechanical detection/subtypes, ordered triage pipeline, category recursive summaries (all four categories), primary next-action contract, optimization applicability signaling, CLI/MCP max_category_summary_items parameter, and evaluation UI framing updates with tests/runtime validation.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Implemented Misclassification Triage v2 core changes: strict mechanical detection (removed generic 'failed' trigger), per-item mechanical_subtype/mechanical_details, deterministic topic category assignment + purity, category summaries for all four categories with max_category_summary_items budget, mechanical subtype totals, deterministic primary_next_action + optimization_applicability, CLI flag --max-category-summary-items, MCP pass-through max_category_summary_items, and UI updates (Score-Configuration RCA label, category summaries, subtype breakdown, primary next action/applicability panel). Validation: pytest plexus/rca_analysis_test.py, pytest plexus/cli/evaluation/feedback_integration_test.py, pytest MCP/shared/analysis_test.py, npm --prefix dashboard run build:fast.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Runtime validation complete on scorecard 1039 / score 45425 with capped sampling: plexus evaluate feedback --days 180 --max-samples 100 --max-category-summary-items 20. Evaluation ID: 889288b5-ba1a-4995-8cb4-992f04e8bb3a. Result status COMPLETED with processedItems=100/100, RCA present, misclassification_analysis present, category_summaries/topic_category_breakdown populated, primary_next_action=score_configuration_optimization, optimization_applicability=applicable, and mechanical_subtype_totals all zero (no pathological blanket mechanical classification).

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Code landed in commit 943d829e5 on feature/plx-f45a6b-data-flywheel-ops. Runtime validation used 100-sample cap and produced evaluation 889288b5-ba1a-4995-8cb4-992f04e8bb3a with populated RCA + triage v2 fields.
